## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated a test covering this change
- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff, zero errors)
- [ ] `make test` passes (pytest, all green)
- [ ] If I touched `eval/stats/` or `eval/runners/`: `make stats` still regenerates
      `analysis/runs/phase5_summary.md` byte-identically (diff empty)
- [ ] No fabricated numbers; delta-only headlines; in-dist vs held-out labeled; negative findings kept
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages
